evals.prompt: Write tests for the Order.confirm() method in Scala 3. The method returns Either[OrderError, (Order, OrderConfirmed)]. It should fail with EmptyOrder if items list is empty, fail with AlreadyProcessed if status != Draft, and succeed for Draft orders with items. Test domain invariants, not implementation details. Use behavioral naming. No mocks needed — pure domain tests. Produce a qa-report contract.
evals.expected_output: Tests with behavioral names (given/when/then style), covering happy path, empty order, and already-processed cases. No mocks. Domain invariants verified. qa-report contract produced.
expectations: Test names describe behavior in domain language
given/when/then or equivalent behavioral naming convention
Happy path: Draft order with items → confirmed successfully
Empty order: Draft order with no items → EmptyOrder error
Already processed: Confirmed/Cancelled/Shipped order → AlreadyProcessed error
No mocks — tests call pure domain methods directly
Tests verify domain invariants (not just return types)
qa-report contract produced with all required fields
Domain Invariants Verified table is filled in

evals.prompt: Write tests for the Money value object in Rust. Money has private fields, Money::new() returning Result (rejects negatives), add() returning Result with CurrencyMismatch error, and Currency enum (USD/EUR/GBP). Write behavioral tests, include a property-based test (proptest) for addition associativity, verify domain invariants. No implementation mirroring. Produce a qa-report contract.
evals.expected_output: Tests with behavioral names, property-based test using proptest, no implementation mirroring. Tests verify domain invariants for non-negative amounts and currency matching.
expectations: Property-based test using proptest or quickcheck for addition associativity
Tests verify: negative amount rejected, same-currency addition works, cross-currency fails
All tests are pure — no I/O, no mocking
No tests that check internal field values directly
qa-report contract produced with all required fields
Domain Invariants Verified table is filled in (not empty)
